name: Crock Pot Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound beef tip round, in small chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except rice to the crock pot.
2. Stir to blend well. It helps to dissolve the tomato paste in the water first before adding the rest of the ingredients.
3. Cook for 8 hours on low heat, covered.
4. Serve over cooked rice.
